TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tatayna bangcal balaki Ś•≥šļļ,ÁĺéŚú®ŤÄĀŚĻī atuuday a tademaw pasutatayna udip tatenga u tatayna anu balaki mabayi ku bihid. udup masumad balaki tu akaddihian . nika tatenga tatayna balaki tu, iya abangcalay . u mahiniay abangcal caykaw nu limecedan ukaying caypakademec balaki tu ku tatayna idaw ku babgcal atukuhan balaki tu ku tatayna nayay tu ku nu kaing a bangecal widasa u masanu tademawan tu ku wayway. . yu nikaudip manikety anu malikeluh tu baluduhay akawaw sa mapacekil ku punu' masinanut ku kawaw. . tu ipaladah mamin tu ku kawaw sa sabangsi ku kunipisahemay , mahida u nayiay ku lawdipalafah katukuh ilima nida masinanut ku , mamin ku kawaw masadep, u sinanut, masabalaki kukawa. . utatahna anu balaki , idawku misaicelang a bangcal. ubalakiya tu a tatayna , malucuked hanay nu labunu luma' ,sakahenekan nu wawa a cacangdayan. tudedemiad nu sananal ucacanan a kawa idawnamin itagah malikat ku pikiyaku. nikaudip ahican mikelul ku kasuy belac simal cikah su uciya , , icuwaay kawni cay kangeluan apatahekal. nilecuhsn nu labunu luma' kaydihan atu ekeng tu cacanan akawaw matineng namin. paayaw NAMI tu labu nu lumaau , kiyu Hina tawal caay pisakapah tu u dip. tatayna katukuh balaki , idaw ku nikabalaliyan nu bang cal. umihcaan mahida u nayay ku balucu' amikelit a takini', , cay kasumad mu nuydaan a bangcal, u kubid nu bihid haymada mukayskau ku kubid i kalimucu' nu mata atu kalaw. . imahini u bangcal nu heni ,cay kawni kelitan caypaeteng sa musilud, idadan ilud han kuyda namicaliwayay a niculilan nipaneknek tu wayway, mahida nu hekalay adih han kasenengan tatayna balaki, mahida ikupuay asumanahay aepah, maselep tu acedah ,nika idaw ku sapisunil. manamuh miadih sa, mahida paliwan tu dadatengan . tatayna katukuh balaki , mahida bangcal ku balucu'. tademaw katukuh balaki, kanahatu nayay tu ku ekeng nika afih han mahida u tanektekay. tademaw balaki, kanahatu caytu kahida yu masakaph henay , nika idaw tu ku bangcal nu wayway. tademaw balakitu caytu kahida umasakapahay, idahenay ku kaydih , nika matineng tu sadep atu misaicelang . tademaw katukuh balaki nayay tu nu masakapahay a sapaculi, nika idaw namakabalucu'ay sapidateng . tatayna katukuh balaki, idaw ku tabesiw han bangcal . tademaw katukuh balaki, kiya madateng kunikaudip tu abesa cupelak idaw ku beliw sananay abangesi. . tatayna hayni kabalaki, kanahatu mangelu' nika ungelu' payawan sa, amihica cakalinges cakatadikud. miadih tu wawa siekeng tu balaki , siluma' tu sikawatu, ukanamuhan . maadih tu acawa siekeng lipahak, mapulung balaki, hatini kunamuh . . tatayna katukuh balaki a bangcal yabangcal nipaydangan, miliwkay ku bangcal. , bangcal i tanektek nu heni, bangcal i pasaicelang nu heni.
S.PHON: tatajna baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ bar~…ĺaki **,**** atuudaj a tad…ômaw pasutatajna udip tat…ôŇča u tatajna anu bar~…ĺaki mabaji ku bińßid. udup masumad bar~…ĺaki tu akaddińßian . nika tat…ôŇča tatajna bar~…ĺaki tu, ija abaŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj . u mańßiniaj abaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ¶ajkaw nu r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan ukajiŇč ¶ajpakad…ôm…ô ¶ bar~…ĺaki tu ku tatajna idaw ku babg ¶ar~…ĺ atukuńßan bar~…ĺaki tu ku tatajna najaj tu ku nu kaiŇč a baŇč…ô ¶ar~…ĺ widasa u masanu tad…ômawan tu ku wajwaj. . ju nikaudip manik…ôtj anu mar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńß tu bar~…ĺuduńßaj akawaw sa mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ ku punu Ē~ ° masinanut ku kawaw. . tu ipar~…ĺadańß mamin tu ku kawaw sa sabaŇčsi ku kunipisańß…ômaj , mańßida u najiaj ku r~…ĺawdipar~…ĺafańß katukuńß ir~…ĺima nida masinanut ku , mamin ku kawaw masad…ôp, u sinanut, masabar~…ĺaki kukawa. . utatańßna anu bar~…ĺaki , idawku misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. ubar~…ĺakija tu a tatajna , mar~…ĺu ¶uk…ôd ńßanaj nu r~…ĺabunu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ,sakańß…ôn…ôkan nu wawa a ¶a ¶aŇčdajan. tud…ôd…ômiad nu sananar~…ĺ u ¶a ¶anan a kawa idawnamin itagańß mar~…ĺikat ku pikijaku. nikaudip ańßi ¶an mik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku kasuj b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ simar~…ĺ ¶ikańß su u ¶ija , , i ¶uwaaj kawni ¶aj kaŇč…ôr~…ĺuan apatańß…ôkar~…ĺ. nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßsn nu r~…ĺabunu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° kajdińßan atu …ôk…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶anan akawaw matin…ôŇč namin. paajaw nami tu r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺumaau , kiju ńßina tawar~…ĺ ¶aaj pisakapańß tu u dip. tatajna katukuńß bar~…ĺaki , idaw ku nikabar~…ĺar~…ĺijan nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. umińß ¶aan mańßida u najaj ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° amik…ôr~…ĺit a takini Ē~ °, , ¶aj kasumad mu nujdaan a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ, u kubid nu bińßid ńßajmada mukajskau ku kubid i kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° nu mata atu kar~…ĺaw. . imańßini u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôni , ¶aj kawni k…ôr~…ĺitan ¶ajpa…ôt…ôŇč sa musir~…ĺud, idadan ir~…ĺud ńßan kujda nami ¶ar~…ĺiwajaj a ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nipan…ôkn…ôk tu wajwaj, mańßida nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj adińß ńßan kas…ôn…ôŇčan tatajna bar~…ĺaki, mańßida ikupuaj asumanańßaj a…ôpańß, mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tu a ¶…ôdańß ,nika idaw ku sapisunir~…ĺ. manamuńß miadińß sa, mańßida par~…ĺiwan tu dadat…ôŇčan . tatajna katukuńß bar~…ĺaki , mańßida baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. tad…ômaw katukuńß bar~…ĺaki, kanańßatu najaj tu ku …ôk…ôŇč nika afińß ńßan mańßida u tan…ôkt…ôkaj. tad…ômaw bar~…ĺaki, kanańßatu ¶ajtu kańßida ju masakapńß ńß…ônaj , nika idaw tu ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nu wajwaj. tad…ômaw bar~…ĺakitu ¶ajtu kańßida umasakapańßaj, idańß…ônaj ku kajdińß , nika matin…ôŇč tu sad…ôp atu misai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč . tad…ômaw katukuńß bar~…ĺaki najaj tu nu masakapańßaj a sapa ¶ur~…ĺi, nika idaw namakabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj sapidat…ôŇč . tatajna katukuńß bar~…ĺaki, idaw ku tab…ôsiw ńßan baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ . tad…ômaw katukuńß bar~…ĺaki, kija madat…ôŇč kunikaudip tu ab…ôsa ¶up…ôr~…ĺak idaw ku b…ôr~…ĺiw sananaj abaŇč…ôsi. . tatajna ńßajni kabar~…ĺaki, kanańßatu maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° nika uŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° pajawan sa, amińßi ¶a ¶akar~…ĺiŇč…ôs ¶akatadikud. miadińß tu wawa si…ôk…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺaki , sir~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu sikawatu, ukanamuńßan . maadińß tu a ¶awa si…ôk…ôŇč r~…ĺipańßak, mapur~…ĺuŇč bar~…ĺaki, ńßatini kunamuńß . . tatajna katukuńß bar~…ĺaki a baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ jabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nipajdaŇčan, mir~…ĺiwkaj ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ. , baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ i tan…ôkt…ôk nu ńß…ôni, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ i pasai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu ńß…ôni.
S.FORM: tatayna bangcal balaki Ś•≥šļļ,ÁĺéŚú®ŤÄĀŚĻī atuuday a tademaw pasutatayna udip tatenga u tatayna anu balaki mabayi ku bihid. udup masumad balaki tu akaddihian . nika tatenga tatayna balaki tu, tademawan tu ku wayway. . yu nikaudip manikety anu malikeluh tu baluduhay akawaw sa mapacekil ku punu' masinanut ku kawaw. . tu ipaladah mamin tu ku kawaw sa sabangsi ku kunipisahemay , mahida u nayiay ku lawdipalafah katukuh ilima nida masinanut ku , mamin ku kawaw masadep, u sinanut, masabalaki kukawa. . utatahna anu balaki , idawku misaicelang a bangcal. ubalakiya tu a tatayna , malucuked caytu kahida umasakapahay, idahenay ku kaydih , nika matineng tu sadep atu misaicelang . tademaw katukuh balaki nayay tu nu masakapahay a sapaculi, nika idaw namakabalucu'ay sapidateng . tatayna katukuh balaki, idaw ku tabesiw han bangcal . tademaw katukuh balaki, kiya madateng kunikaudip tu abesa cupelak idaw ku beliw sananay abangesi. . tatayna hayni kabalaki, kanahatu mangelu' nika ungelu' payawan sa, amihica cakalinges cakatadikud. miadih tu wawa siekeng tu balaki , siluma' tu sikawatu, ukanamuhan . maadih tu acawa siekeng lipahak, mapulung balaki, hatini kunamuh . . tatayna katukuh balaki a bangcal yabangcal nipaydangan, miliwkay ku bangcal. , bangcal i tanektek nu heni, bangcal i pasaicelang nu heni.
